mapper.insert:
insert into chat_message(id, member_id, nickname, role, content, ip, deleted, reg_date) values
(#{m.id}, #{m.memberId}, #{m.nickname}, #{m.role}, #{m.content}, #{m.ip}, #{m.deleted}, #{m.createdAt})
mapper.select: select id, member_id as memberId, nickname, role, content, ip, deleted, reg_date as createdAt from chat_message where deleted=0 order by id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update chat_message set deleted=1 where id=#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into chat_sanction(sanction_type, member_id, ip, nickname, reason, expires_at, revoked, created_by, reg_date) values(#{sanctionType}, #{memberId}, #{ip}, #{nickname}, #{reason}, #{expiresAt}, 0, #{createdBy}, now())
mapper.select: select id, sanction_type as sanctionType, member_id as memberId, ip, nickname, reason, expires_at as expiresAt, revoked, created_by as createdBy, reg_date as regDate from chat_sanction where revoked=0 and (expires_at is null or expires_at > now()) order by id desc
mapper.update: update chat_sanction set revoked=1 where id=#{id}
